ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., State-gov, Private) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (census estimate) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Level of education attained */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of education level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains reported */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses reported */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "income_result" TEXT /* Income level (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geography (region or city) where the individual resides */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the individual works in */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Exact salary of the individual */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has health insurance */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is a veteran */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has any disabilities */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_income_result FOREIGN KEY ("income_result") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_category"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_education_num FOREIGN KEY ("education_num") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Associate, Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., Engineering, Business, Arts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the work class (e.g., Public, Private, Non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the occupation is typically found in */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Minimum education level required for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Income category (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income range */,
  "range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for identifying the type of device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Login timestamp */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Logout timestamp */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for identifying the type of device and browser used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id")
)
